policy.note: This loop runs review-only guards and handoff generators. It does not select source roots, read private source contents, promote assets or publish files.

next_actions: Use this script as the daily autonomous KosmoReferences/KosmoAsset review-only loop.
If source-root remains blocked, present the owner review packet and do not run private extraction.
After a real source root is recorded, rerun this loop before any pilot-first private inventory.
